name: Verizon Data Breach Investigations Report (DBIR)
description: The industry gold standard for breach data analysis. Examines tens of thousands of real-world security incidents and confirmed data breaches annually, providing statistical breakdowns of attack patterns, threat actors, and targeted industries.

name: CrowdStrike Global Threat Report
description: Comprehensive adversary intelligence report covering eCrime, nation-state actors, and hacktivism. Features named threat actor profiles, breakout time metrics, and year-over-year attack trend analysis.

name: Mandiant M-Trends Report
description: Derived from Mandiant's frontline incident response engagements. Covers global median dwell time, initial access vectors, targeted industries, and detection improvements. Essential IR benchmarking data.

name: IBM X-Force Threat Intelligence Index
description: Global threat intelligence derived from billions of data points. Covers top attack vectors, most targeted industries, geographic trends, and vulnerability exploitation patterns.

name: IBM Cost of a Data Breach Report
description: The definitive financial impact study of data breaches. Surveys hundreds of organizations globally to calculate average breach costs by industry, country, root cause, and mitigating factors like AI and automation.

name: Microsoft Digital Defense Report
description: Insights from Microsoft's unique vantage point across cloud, endpoint, and identity ecosystems. Covers nation-state threats, cybercrime, supply chain attacks, and critical infrastructure targeting.

name: Sophos Active Adversary Report
description: Analysis of real-world attacker behaviors from Sophos IR and MDR engagements. Covers root causes, dwell times, RDP abuse, credential theft patterns, and ransomware operator tactics.

name: Palo Alto Networks Unit 42 Incident Response Report
description: Data-driven findings from Unit 42's global incident response practice. Covers ransomware trends, initial access techniques, extortion tactics, and industry-specific attack patterns.

name: ENISA Threat Landscape Report
description: The EU's comprehensive annual threat assessment. Covers prime threats (ransomware, malware, social engineering, DDoS, supply chain), threat actor motivations, and sector-specific analysis across EU member states.

name: Red Canary Threat Detection Report
description: Detection-focused analysis mapping real-world threats to MITRE ATT&CK. Covers top techniques, trending threats, and actionable detection opportunities with detailed analytics and ATT&CK coverage heat maps.

name: Dragos Year in Review (OT/ICS)
description: The leading annual report on industrial control systems and operational technology threats. Covers ICS-targeting threat groups, vulnerability advisories, ransomware impacts on industrial operations, and sector analysis.

name: Recorded Future Annual Threat Report
description: Strategic threat intelligence analysis covering geopolitical cyber trends, dark web activity, ransomware ecosystems, and emerging nation-state capabilities. Built on the world's largest intelligence dataset.

name: Cisco Talos Year in Review
description: Telemetry-driven threat landscape analysis from one of the largest commercial threat intelligence teams. Covers commodity malware, ransomware, network-based attacks, and email threat trends.

name: Elastic Global Threat Report
description: Open data-driven analysis of endpoint, cloud, and network threats. Covers malware trends by OS, cloud security posture findings, and defense evasion techniques observed across Elastic's telemetry.

name: Fortinet Global Threat Landscape Report
description: Semi-annual report drawn from FortiGuard network telemetry. Covers exploit trends, malware families, botnet activity, and regional attack patterns with quantitative analysis across millions of sensors.

name: Proofpoint State of the Phish Report
description: Global phishing and social engineering threat analysis. Covers phishing click rates, BEC trends, MFA bypass techniques, user awareness benchmarks, and industry-specific targeting data.

name: Secureworks State of the Threat Report
description: Annual report from Secureworks Counter Threat Unit covering ransomware group activity, initial access broker trends, nation-state operations, and business email compromise evolution.

name: Google Cloud Threat Horizons Report
description: Cloud-focused threat intelligence report from Google's Threat Analysis Group and Mandiant. Covers cloud-specific attack vectors, misconfiguration exploitation, and identity-based attacks targeting GCP and multi-cloud environments.

name: Akamai State of the Internet Report
description: Internet security research reports covering DDoS trends, API security threats, web application attacks, and DNS traffic analysis drawn from Akamai's massive global network infrastructure.

name: Wiz State of Cloud Security Report
description: Cloud security threat research derived from scanning hundreds of thousands of cloud accounts. Covers misconfiguration prevalence, exposure risks, lateral movement paths, and container security findings.

name: Check Point Cyber Security Report
description: Global cyber attack trends and statistics from Check Point Research. Covers weekly attack volume by sector and region, top malware families, and emerging threat tactics.

name: SonicWall Cyber Threat Report
description: Annual mid-year and full-year threat data covering ransomware volume, cryptojacking trends, IoT malware, encrypted attacks, and intrusion attempts across SonicWall's global sensor network.

name: SANS Cyber Threat Intelligence Survey
description: Survey-based analysis of how organizations produce and consume threat intelligence. Covers CTI program maturity, tool usage, intelligence sharing practices, and team staffing benchmarks.

name: Trustwave Global Security Report
description: Insights from Trustwave's managed security services and penetration testing practice. Covers web application vulnerabilities, database exposure, email threats, and network compromise patterns.

name: Chainalysis Crypto Crime Report
description: Definitive analysis of cryptocurrency-related cybercrime. Covers ransomware payment flows, crypto laundering techniques, sanctions evasion, darknet market volumes, and law enforcement seizures.

name: Snyk State of Open Source Security Report
description: Analysis of open-source vulnerability trends across major ecosystems (npm, PyPI, Maven, Go). Covers supply chain risk, dependency vulnerabilities, fix times, and container image security.

name: Flashpoint Global Threat Intelligence Report
description: Deep and dark web intelligence covering threat actor communities, ransomware-as-a-service ecosystems, initial access broker marketplaces, and vulnerability exploitation trends.

name: CISA Cybersecurity Year in Review
description: US federal government perspective on critical cyber threats, vulnerabilities, and advisories. Includes CISA's Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog context, Shields Up campaigns, and critical infrastructure defense summaries.
